user.title: Ambient Themes
user.description: Select the Home Assistant area to control with ambient themes.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this ambient instance (used as the device name in Home Assistant).
data_description.area_ids: Select one or more areas whose lights this instance will control.

data_description.excluded_entities: Light entities in this area to exclude from ambient control.
data_description.dynamic: Automatically shift colors on a timer.
data_description.smart_shuffle: Order color assignments for smooth hue transitions.
data_description.cycle_interval: How often (in seconds) to change the color assignment when dynamic cycling is enabled.
data_description.contrast: Brightness spread across lights (0 = uniform, 100 = maximum spread).
data_description.brightness_curve: Gradually dim lights relative to time after sunset.
data_description.survive_restart: Automatically restore the active state after a Home Assistant restart.
data_description.stagger_ms: Delay (ms) between each light's update, creating a wave ripple effect. 0 = all lights change at once.
data_description.hue_drift: Degrees to rotate the palette hues each cycle, creating a slow continuous color evolution.
